entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate any topic on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: 더 날카로운 주장을 위한 AI 토론 코치 is a 집중된 방식 to 사용 AI 위한 학습 instead of 수동적으로 답만 모으기. 이 모드는 특정 학습 과제를 중심으로 만들어졌습니다: 아무 주제나 골라 실제 토론처럼 맞붙어 보세요. 한쪽 입장을 고르고, 도전을 받으며, 더 나은 주장을 만드는 법을 배웁니다.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: practical guide
entries.value: 더 날카로운 주장을 위한 AI 토론 코치: 실전 가이드

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate any topic. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Explain My Answer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: 어떤 주제든 토론하기에서 실시간 모드를 시작하세요. 가까운 학습 형식을 원한다면 내 답 설명하기도 시도해 보세요. 플랫폼을 더 넓게 보려면 AI 학습 동반자가 모두를 위해 무엇을 해야 하는지 읽어 보세요.

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims.
entries.value: 약한 주장을 강화하세요.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: 더 강력한 논리력을 원하는 학생, 토론자, 작가 및 호기심 많은 학습자.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the 모드 무엇 당신 are trying to learn or produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of 하나 giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a 목표, try something, get 피드백, repair the weak spot, and choose the 다음 행동.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matters. A general chatbot can 답 almost anything, but a 학습 모드 gives the conversation a shape. It nudges 당신 toward the kind of 생각, 연습, 피드백, or exploration that helps the 아이디어 stick.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: 코치가 한 번에 하나씩 강력한 반론을 제시하며 중요한 논점을 추적합니다.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: 빠르게 시작하면서도 나에게 맞게 조정되는 세션을 원할 때 어떤 주제든 토론하기를 사용하세요. 첫 목표는 그럴듯하게 보이는 것이 아니라 다음 단계가 가능하다고 느끼게 하는 것입니다.

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
